description:
Antagonistic quality review of `hx-ripple` (T4-09) **after implementation completes**.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-ripple/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, color typed, disabled prop typed, unbounded prop typed
2. Accessibility — purely decorative animation, must be `aria-hidden`, `prefers-reduced-motion` completely disables the effect (no fallback animation), does not interfere with focus management or keyboard interaction, axe-core pass
3. Tests — click triggers ripple, reduced motion disables, keyboard triggers ripple, unbounded mode, disabled state, 80%+ coverage
4. Storybook — on buttons, on icons, bounded/unbounded, reduced motion demo
5. CSS — `--hx-*` tokens for ripple color/opacity, CSS animation (not JS), CSS parts (ripple)
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB, animation is CSS-only (no requestAnimationFrame)
7. Drupal — applicable as enhancement on interactive elements

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-ripple/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-ripple — T4-09 antagonistic quality review
